nasb.text: “It will come about in that day that I will respond,” declares the Lord. “I will respond to the heavens, and they will respond to the earth,

esv.text: “And in that day I will answer, declares the Lord, I will answer the heavens, and they shall answer the earth,

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“到那日，我必應允， 我必應允天，天必應允地，

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “那时，我要应允， 我要应允天的祈求， 天要应允地的祈求，
